temperature.description: Controls randomness. Lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling. Only consider tokens with top_p cumulative probability.

top_k.description: Only sample from the top K tokens.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalize tokens based on their frequency in the text so far.

presence_penalty.description: Penalize tokens that have appeared in the text so far.

min_p.description: Minimum probability for a token to be considered.

stop.description: Stop sequences. The API will stop generating at these sequences.

stream.description: Stream the response as it is generated.
